concepts.headline: San Francisco hills, flattened.
concepts.subline: The premium electric commuter bike built for the Marina.
concepts.rationale: Directly addresses SF's hills with high-contrast, premium imagery tailored to Marina locals.

concepts.headline: Ditch the traffic. Keep the view.
concepts.subline: Conquer your daily commute with premium electric power.
concepts.rationale: Appeals to the outdoor, active lifestyle of Marina pedestrians seeking a better commute.
